title: euryloma latiflora
intro: Euryloma latiflora, also known as Eurycoma longifolia, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia, and is commonly known as the "Tongkat Ali" tree. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to boost energy, enhance mental clarity, and improve immune function. The health benefits of Euryloma latiflora include improved physical performance, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced overall well-being. Euryloma latiflora is typically prepared for herbal use through extraction or infusion, with the most common preparations being capsules, tablets, or tea.
